The target for irradiation were taken in the form of
the stacks of these target interspersed with thin
aluminum foils of desired thicknesses wherever needed.
The gamma ray activities produced in each target
foil along with its catcher were recorded one by one
using a pre-calibrated 60 cc HPGe detector coupled to
a PC based data acquisition system.
The energy calibration of the detector was done by
using a Eu-152 gamma ray source of known strength.
The resolution of the detector was found to be 1.9 KeV
at 1.33 MeV gamma ray of Co-60.
